content:
Find ALL free Gemini models available via Google AI API (the API that uses AIza keys). I need:
1. Complete list of free Gemini models (not Vertex AI)
2. The exact model names for API calls
3. Rate limits and quotas for free tier
4. Which models support: coding, vision/multimodal, fast tasks

Search Google AI Studio docs, Gemini API docs. Return structured list with model ID, capabilities, and free tier limits.
<!-- OMO_INTERNAL_INITIATOR -->
